HomePage.title: AI Rural Health Triage
HomePage.subtitle: Accessible Health Assistant for Rural Communities

Disclaimer.title: Medical Disclaimer
Disclaimer.text: This system is an AI-powered triage assistant, not a medical diagnosis tool. Please consult a qualified healthcare professional for medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.

Chatbot.welcome: Hello! I am here to help. What symptoms are you experiencing?
Chatbot.fatigue: Are you feeling unusually tired or fatigued?
Chatbot.duration_prompt: How many days have you been experiencing these symptoms?
